brand.name: TeachRepo
brand.tagline: Git repo → paywalled course in minutes
brand.tagline_short: Turn any GitHub repo into a course.
brand.description: TeachRepo converts a GitHub repository or Markdown notes into a paywalled, versioned mini-course site. Built for engineers who prefer code-first workflows.

feature_bullets: 📁 Markdown-native — write lessons in the same repo as your code
🔒 Stripe checkout built-in — sell courses or offer them free
📦 Gated StackBlitz/CodeSandbox embeds — learners unlock on purchase
🌿 Git-versioned — every push updates your course automatically
🔗 Affiliate tracking built-in — share revenue with promoters
🆓 Free tier: self-host, keep 100% of revenue
☁️  Hosted SaaS: one-click deploy on Vercel, marketplace listing
